creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad Is this the most beautiful building in the UK?! 😍 Part of the @wattsgallery and Artist’s Village, this is Watt’s Cemetery Chapel, just LOOK at the inside 👀👀 

We have the @artfund National Art Pass which gives you discounted or FREE access to hundreds of museums, galleries and historic houses and right now, you can get a 3 month trial for just £20!!! 

The best £20 you’ll spend this summer - share this with someone who’d love to know!

transcription.text: fun day trips from london part four and this time we're going to a place where you'll find one of the most beautiful buildings in the uk and if you think the outside is beautiful just wait till you see the inside this is the watts cemetery chapel in compton surrey just outside gilford and it's part of the watts gallery and artists village we visited with art funds national art pass which gives you free or discounted tickets to hundreds of museums galleries and historic houses across the uk and right now you can get a three-month trial of the pass for just 20 pounds and trust me when i say this is going to be the best 20 pounds you spend this summer it even gives you special discounts in the museum shops and cafes what's gallery is a must visit you'll discover the home studios and gallery of george watts and his wife renowned designer mary watts there's some incredible paintings sculptures and pottery on display as well as temporary exhibitions and a lovely cafe on site make sure you get the national art pass trial it ends on the 30th of june and share this with someone who would love to know you
